attributes.description: Persistence-mechanism installation events: service installs (System 7045 + Security 4697), scheduled task created/modified/deleted/enabled/disabled/triggered (Security 4698-4702), service status changes (System 7036), WMI subscriptions (Sysmon 19/20/21). Cross-reference with the Registry dashboard's Autoruns/ThreatHunting panel — a service install here usually correlates with a Run key or Services key write in registry.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"filter":[],"highlightAll":true,"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index","query":{"language":"kuery","query":"winlog.event_id : (7045 or 7036 or 4697 or 4698 or 4699 or 4700 or 4701 or 4702 or 19 or 20 or 21)"},"version":true}

attributes.title: Event Log: Persistence — Service Installs + Scheduled Tasks + WMI Subs
